segments.text: listen and then answer the question.
Dreams of finding lost treasure almost came true recently.

translations.zh-Hans: 寻找失落宝藏的梦想最近几乎成了现实。

segments.text: A new machine called the Revealer has been invented and it has been used to detect gold which has been buried in the ground.

translations.zh-Hans: 一种名为“探宝器”的新机器已经问世，并被用来探测埋在地下的黄金。

segments.text: The machine was used in a cave near the seashore where, it is said, pirates used to hide gold.

translations.zh-Hans: 这台机器被用在海边附近的一个洞穴中，据说海盗过去常把黄金藏在那里。

segments.text: The pirates would often bury gold in the cave and then fail to collect it.

translations.zh-Hans: 海盗常把黄金埋在洞里，后来却没能取走。

segments.text: The leader of the party was examining the soil near the entrance to the cave when the machine showed that there was gold under the ground.

translations.zh-Hans: 队长正在检查洞口附近的土壤时，机器显示地下有黄金。

segments.text: Very excited, the party dug a hole two feet deep.

translations.zh-Hans: 队员们非常兴奋，挖了一个两英尺深的坑。

segments.text: They finally found a small gold coin which was almost worthless.

translations.zh-Hans: 最后，他们找到一枚几乎一文不值的小金币。

segments.text: The party then searched the whole cave thoroughly but did not find anything except an empty tin trunk.

translations.zh-Hans: 接着，队员们彻底搜查了整个洞穴，但除了一只空铁皮箱外，什么也没找到。

segments.text: In spite of this, many people are confident that the Revealer may reveal something of value fairly soon.

translations.zh-Hans: 尽管如此，许多人相信“探宝器”不久就可能发现有价值的东西。
